scripts.build: yarn workspace @pipeit/shared run build && yarn workspace @pipeit/mcp run build && yarn workspace @pipeit/server run build && yarn workspace web run build && yarn workspace pipeit.live run build
scripts.build:server: yarn workspace @pipeit/shared run build && yarn workspace @pipeit/server run build
scripts.test: yarn workspace @pipeit/shared test && yarn workspace @pipeit/mcp test && yarn workspace @pipeit/server test && yarn workspace pipeit.live test && yarn workspace web test
scripts.check:types: yarn workspace @pipeit/shared exec tsc --noEmit && yarn workspace @pipeit/mcp exec tsc --noEmit && yarn workspace @pipeit/server exec tsc --noEmit && yarn workspace pipeit.live exec tsc --noEmit && yarn workspace web exec tsc --noEmit
